# [44 days](https://44days.info/)

the 2020 Nagorno-Karabakh war was an armed conflict in the disputed region of Nagorno-Karabakh and the surrounding territories. the main combatants were Azerbaijan, on one side and the self-proclaimed republic of Artsakh and Armenia on the other side. it was the latest escalation of an unresolved conflict over the region, which is internationally recognized as part of Azerbaijan, but partially governed by Artsakh as a result of the forced occupation.

![](https://cdn.trend.az/2021/04/05/raket_050421.jpg)

the fighting began with by Azerbaijan as a result of the Armenian aggression stacked over the past decades, with the primary goal of reclaiming the less mountainous districts of southern Nagorno-Karabakh, which were easier to take than the region's well-fortified interior. the war was marked by the deployment of drones, sensors, long-range heavy artillery and missile strikes. in particular, Azerbaijan's widespread use of [drones](https://baykardefence.com/) was seen as crucial in determining the conflict's outcome. numerous countries and the United Nations strongly condemned the fighting and called on both sides to de-escalate tensions and resume meaningful negotiations without delay.

### as a result, Azerbaijan has decided to share the full list of the MARTYRs who participated throughout the war, however, Armenia still resists in not sharing it. this blog is going to be about the analysis of the MARTYRs who fought for Azerbaijan. while being for respect purposes, the war is never supported at all.
